candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label; matches total revenue/sales concept exactly.
Candidate list includes it, but it is clearly a cost line rather than revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue line.

candidates.why: Explicit cost of revenues / COGS line; matches direct property operating costs subtotal.
This appears to be direct property operating costs and equals COGS, so it should be excluded from SG&A.
Explicit administrative overhead line; populated and best match for SG&A.
Overhead component, but subordinate to the populated explicit administrative subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Unpaid Selling Price of Investment Property
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset-related line, not SG&A.
Operational statistic, not an expense row.

variables.notes: Per SG&A hierarchy, selected only the explicit populated overhead row 'Administrative Expense'. Excluded 'Operating Expenses of Properties' because it is direct property/service cost and aligns with COGS, not SG&A. Did not add component rows because an explicit SG&A row exists and is populated.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears on the provided Income Statement.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest-related, but appears to be a specific component of total interest expense rather than the main reported line.
Explicit interest expense line; best match for XINT.
Finance expense but broader/different than pure interest and should be lower priority.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest, not preferred over the main interest expense line.
Balancing row, should not be used.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit main interest expense line. Excluded lease-interest rows because they appear to be components/supplemental disclosures, not alternative labels for the same primary item.

candidates.why: Best available equity line and preferable to generic total equity because it is shareholder-specific.
Valid equity total, but less specific than shareholder equity.
Not book equity; entire balance sheet total.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the more specific shareholder equity line first, with 'Total Equity' as fallback if labeling changes across periods. No separate non-controlling interest line is present, so BE uses the equity line directly.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: This is an income statement performance line, not a balance sheet minority interest / non-controlling interest equity line.

variables.notes: No balance sheet minority interest/non-controlling interest line appears in the provided statements; therefore MIB is set to empty.
